name: Algochi

methods.name: bootstrap
methods.desc:
Bootstraps the contract by creating the reward ASA and setting the beacon app ID.
Must be called once before any other operations.

methods.name: createPet
methods.desc:
Creates a new pet and mints its corresponding NFT.
Requires payment transaction and initializes pet state with default values.

methods.name: feed
methods.desc:
Feed the pet to increase hunger and earn health-scaled $TAMA rewards.
Commits to a future VRF round for the follow-up play() action.

methods.name: play
methods.desc:
Play with the pet to boost happiness using VRF randomness.
Requires a VRF commitment from a previous feed() call and distributes health-scaled rewards.

methods.name: evolve
methods.desc:
Evolve the pet to the next stage if age requirements are met.
Burns $TAMA and applies a happiness boost.

methods.name: revive
methods.desc: Revive a dead pet by burning $TAMA and resetting stats to baseline values.

methods.name: finalizeTraits
methods.desc:
Finalize pet traits using VRF randomness from the beacon or fallback hash.
Can only be called once per pet after the VRF round delay has passed.

methods.name: vrfTest
methods.desc: Test method for VRF beacon functionality.

desc:
Algochi - Tamagotchi-style NFT pet on Algorand

A Tamagotchi-inspired digital pet game where players care for their pets,
earning $TAMA tokens through feeding and playing, with 3-stage evolutions
and on-chain traits determined by secure VRF.

sourceInfo.errorMessage: OnCompletion must be NoOp && can only call when creating
OnCompletion must be OptIn && can only call when not creating
Randomness not ready - delay not satisfied
invalid number of bytes for arc4.uint64
